name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Machine Spirit Sanctification, ritual maintenance items, scheduler spine, station pair recovery, doctrine conversations, diegetic diagnostic GUIs, strict command hierarchy, action arbitration, dispatcher-owned acquisition/production/consecration/repair/combat-repair, logistics/construction physical access, persistent portrait assignment, structured Work State tabs, diegetic Work-State Reliquary polish, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, machine-type-aware trait taxonomy, expanded priest dossiers, universal known-resource fetch, dispatcher-owned machine logistics fulfillment, runtime economy governors, movement enforcement, scan-routing, brokered runtime services, Conclave Task Auspex diagnostics, Stage 5 movement-failure and proximity-gate repairs, separate Void Priest movement authority, and direct-acquisition active-task pulse so priests who reach ore/resource targets continue into work/mining instead of idling on the destination tile.
